deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
deleteNote: This action cannot be undone. The object will be moved to the AD Recycle Bin if enabled.
attributeWarning: You are modifying advanced attributes. Incorrect values may break authentication, group resolution, or mail delivery.
selectUser: Select a user to view details

clearPasswordNotRequired.title: Clear PasswordNotRequired flag
clearPasswordNotRequired.body:
This account currently allows an empty password (PASSWORD_NOT_REQUIRED is set on userAccountControl). An attacker who learns the username can authenticate with no credential at all.

Clearing this flag turns userAccountControl bit 0x0020 off. The account will then be subject to the domain password policy at the next password change.
clearPasswordNotRequired.checkboxLabel: I understand this user must comply with the domain password policy at the next logon

removeUserSpns.title: Manage Service Principal Names
removeUserSpns.body:
Service Principal Names (SPNs) registered on a user account expose that account to Kerberoasting: any authenticated domain user can request a Kerberos service ticket for the SPN and crack the account password offline.

Review the list below and remove any SPN that no longer corresponds to a running service. System SPNs (HOST, ldap, krbtgt, etc.) cannot be removed from this dialog because removing them would cause a service outage.
removeUserSpns.systemSpnTooltip: System SPN, cannot be removed safely from this dialog
removeUserSpns.noRemovableSpns: No removable SPNs on this account
removeUserSpns.noSpnsAtAll: No SPNs registered on this account
removeUserSpns.summary: Removed {{removed}} SPN(s), kept {{kept}}, blocked {{blocked}} system SPN(s)
